title: Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew — Chapter 847
main_description: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 202 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
key_events: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
